# getrequest

getrequest is API reliability infrastructure for modern teams.

It lets engineers instantly launch HTTP API endpoints, capture and inspect
every inbound request in real time, replay failures against fixed builds,
and share debug evidence across teams — without managing API gateways,
servers, or observability stacks.

## Product
- Category: API infrastructure, developer tools
- Positioning: The API Reliability Infrastructure for modern teams
- Tagline: Never miss an API request.

## Key capabilities
- Instant endpoints: Launch a production-ready API endpoint in under 60 seconds (mock JSON or proxy)
- Live inspector: Real-time stream of every request — headers, body, status, latency
- Request replay: Re-fire any captured request with original payload intact (Pro)
- Shareable debug links: Permanent URL to any captured request, viewable without an account (Pro)
- Smart forwarding: Transparent proxy to any upstream API, full exchange logged
- Usage metering: Request volume tracking, pre-limit alerts, audit trail

## Pricing
- Free: $0/mo — 10,000 requests/month, 7-day log retention
- Dev: $9/mo — 100,000 requests/month, 30-day log retention
- Pro: $99/mo — 1,000,000 requests/month, 30-day retention, request replay, shareable debug links

## Pages
- / — Homepage and product overview
- /features — Full feature documentation
- /pricing — Pricing plans and comparison
- /use-cases — Use case scenarios for different team types
- /blog — Technical articles on API reliability, infrastructure, and developer tooling
